description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including a variety of green and purple-leaved trees and shrubs. The building features a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, geometric layout with white and beige exterior walls. A swimming pool is situated in the backyard, adjacent to a paved patio area, and the property is enclosed by a fence and driveway. The front entrance is accessible via a pathway flanked by trees, and the overall site is rectangular with the house centrally positioned. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, maximizing natural light. The design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, white and beige walls, and lush landscaping, including a backyard pool and patio. The property is rectangular, with trees and shrubs surrounding the house and an asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pathway, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the backyard pool, patio area, and extensive tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and the back facade with large windows and open outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, more trees, and the driveway leading to the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
